basics.name: Dimple Shukla
basics.label: Lead Flutter Engineer
basics.summary: I engineer mobile apps where performance is a feature, scale is built in, and quality = f(detail). Lead Flutter Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering high-performance, scalable mobile systems, including real-time and data-intensive applications in fintech domains. Proven track record of improving application performance, reducing latency, and owning end-to-end delivery of production-grade systems.

work.name: HDFC Securities
work.summary: Lead engineer on HDFC Sky mobile application, architecting high-performance fintech modules for 5M+ users.
highlights: Architected and owned end-to-end development of Mutual Funds 2.0 module (BSE 2.0 migration) handling real-time market data, SIP automation, and lumpsum transactions with UPI/NetBanking integrations; delivered complex financial workflows with 99.7% transaction success rate

Optimized widget rendering pipeline and state management reducing app latency by 35% and improving frame rate stability to 60fps; profiled and resolved memory leaks across 50+ screens using DevTools and performance tracking
Designed real-time data synchronization layer using WebSocket integration and efficient state management (BLoC pattern) handling concurrent user operations with sub-200ms latency
Migrated 100+ deep links to AppsFlyer OneLink ensuring zero downtime, improved attribution tracking, and enhanced user journey analytics
Established clean architecture principles and created 25+ technical artifacts (PRDs, solution designs, ADRs, workflows) elevating engineering documentation standards across 12-person team
Mentored junior engineers on Flutter internals, widget lifecycle, performance profiling, and production debugging practices; improved team delivery velocity by 40%

work.name: Marmon Holdings
work.position: Senior Mobile Application Developer / Tech Lead
work.summary: Tech lead for enterprise mobile applications, driving architectural improvements and team productivity.
highlights: Led cross-functional development of RailSource and RepairCentral enterprise applications serving 50K+ daily users; architected modular microservices-based mobile interfaces using clean architecture patterns

Executed major architectural refactor reducing app crash rate by 20%, improving performance metrics by 40%, and decreasing time-to-first-interaction by 600ms through optimized build configuration and efficient state management

Accelerated team delivery velocity by 50% through mentorship program, developer workflow optimization, and establishment of scalable development practices; reduced PR review cycle time from 8 hours to 2 hours
Implemented comprehensive testing strategy (unit, widget, integration) achieving 85% code coverage and reducing production bugs by 35%
Designed and owned architecture decisions for platform SDK integration, offline-first data synchronization, and real-time notification systems handling 10K+ concurrent connections

work.name: Yes Securities
work.summary: Senior engineer building high-performance real-time trading platform with sub-100ms latency requirements.
highlights: Architected and shipped Omni VSL 2.0 trading platform handling real-time market data feeds, order execution, and portfolio analytics for 200K+ concurrent traders; achieved 99.9% uptime SLA
Optimized end-to-end data pipeline reducing latency by 25% (1200ms → 900ms) through WebSocket middleware optimization, efficient message parsing, and state synchronization strategies
Engineered high-performance order placement module processing 5K+ orders/second with <100ms order-to-execution latency; implemented robust error handling and transaction rollback mechanisms
Built real-time market data display system synchronizing 50+ concurrent data feeds with optimized widget rendering and efficient state management (BLoC pattern) maintaining 60fps UI performance
Designed portfolio tracking and live P&L calculation systems with efficient stream processing and caching strategies handling complex portfolio compositions and risk calculations in real-time

work.name: AimInfologics
highlights: Delivered multiple mobile applications across industries
Led a team of developers handling full SDLC
Built scalable and maintainable applications
Collaborated across product, design, and backend teams
